title: Quantitative determination and localization of cathepsin D and its inhibitors.
author_string: Minarowska, Alina, Karwowska, Alicja, Gacko, Marek
abstract: A literature survey was performed of the methods of quantitative assessment of the activity and concentration of cathepsin D and its inhibitors. Usefulness of non-modified and modified proteins and synthetic peptides as measurement substrates was evaluated. The survey includes also chemical and immunochemical methods used to determine the distribution of cathepsin D and its inhibitors in cells and tissues.
